data.value: Input water and electro expense data

data.name: Associator_lblChangeIntoOne
data.value: Per Receipt can only redeem 1 item

data.name: BizGrp_MessageError
data.value: Failure, work group name has existed.

data.name: Contract_ChargeStartDate
data.value: Invalid Formula Start/End Date, Please Check

data.name: Hidden_DateTime
data.value: Expense Start Date cannot be earlier than Contract Start Date

data.name: Hidden_hidFloorArea
data.value: Missing or wrong gross area information

data.name: Hidden_hidRepeat
data.value: Failure, existed ID for specified object.

data.name: Hidden_hidUnitCode
data.value: Unit ID cannot be empty, you must select one.

data.name: Lease_ExistInterestRate
data.value: Expense Type already exist in Late Payment Rate

data.name: Member_NoMemberID
data.value: Member Card Number does not exist!

data.name: PayOut_PayOutAmtBig
data.value: Returned amount exceeds that of commissioned to receive.

data.name: Prompt_Before_Charge_No
data.value: Failure, prophase expense has not been generated.

data.name: Prompt_conLeaseMonthSettleDays
data.value: Please enter fixed number of days in month!

data.name: Prompt_Contact_Date_No
data.value: Failure, settlement date range conflicts with contract items.

data.name: Prompt_First_Charge_No
data.value: First phase expense has not been generated!

data.name: Prompt_InputFloat
data.value: Must specify value up to decimal digits

data.name: Prompt_LeaseChargeAccount
data.value: Percentage lease contract cannot calculate here.

data.name: Prompt_Month_Charge_Yes
data.value: Expenses already generated for selected month!

data.name: Prompt_PayInPayOut
data.value: Total returned equals to receivable on commission

data.name: Prompt_SessionIsNull
data.value: Overtime,login again,please!/网页已过时,请重新登录!

data.name: Prompt_thisPaidGreaterPaid
data.value: Sum of individual invoice payment greater than total payment

data.name: Prompt_thisPaidMoreList
data.value: Total Payment Amount is greater than Detail Amount

data.name: PublicMes_ErrorLog
data.value: Abnormality occurs, please refer to error log

data.name: PublicMes_NotNode
data.value: Error in saving, no connection nodes.

data.value: Tenant Rent and Area Analysis Report

data.name: Rpt_lblTradeSalesAnalysis
data.value: Sales Gravity Analysis by Merchandise Assortments

data.name: Sale_NoShopID
data.value: TenantID not found, please check transaction file.
